semantics.label: Nakala mbadala ya picha ya mandharinyuma
semantics.description: Ikiwa kivinjari hakiwezi kupakia picha, maandishi haya yataonyeshwa badala yake. Pia hutumiwa na teknolojia saidizi.

semantics.label: Predefined icon
semantics.description: Using a predefined icon for the hotspots.

semantics.label: Uploaded image
semantics.description:
Use your own image for the hotspots icon.
75px by 75px is recommended for your image.

fields.label: Nafasi ya eneo lenye mtandao
fields.description: Bofya kwenye picha ya kijipicha ili kuweka eneo lenye mtandao

fields.label: Predefined icon
fields.description: Using a predefined icon for the hotspot.

fields.label: Uploaded image
fields.description:
Use your own image for the hotspot icon.
75px by 75px is recommended for your image.

fields.label: Picha nzima ya sehemu ya nyuma
fields.description: Wakati mtumiaji anapobofya eneo lenye mtandao dukizi itafunika picha nzima ya mandharinyuma

fields.label: Kichwa
fields.description: Optional header for the popup. This is used by assistive technologies.

semantics.label: Lebo ya eneo lenye mtandao kwa ajili ya teknolojia ya usaidizi
semantics.description: Itasaidia kutangaza kipengele cha eneo lenye mtandao kilichoelekezwa mahali husika ikiwa hakuna kichwa kilichobainishwa cha tovuti ya eneo lenye mtandao. #num inaweza kutumika kuchukua nafasi ya namba ya eneo lenye mtandao.

semantics.label: Funga lebo ya kitufe kwa teknolojia saidizi
Label for assistive technologies denoting that hotspot contains Audio/Video
